title: Lead Revenue Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort
jsonLd.description:
We at Kumarakom Lake Resort are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort:
Kumarakom Lake Resort is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
